name: Moral Semantics Survive Machine Translation: Cross-Lingual Evidence from Moral Foundations Corpora

description: arXiv:2605.22660v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Moral language is subtle and culturally variable, making it difficult to translate faithfully across languages. Idiomatic expressions, slang, and cultural references introduce hard-to-avoid translation artifacts. Yet automated moral classification depends on language-specific annotated corpora that exist almost exclusively in English. We...
author: Maciej Skorski
